name: World of Weavaria RPG
description:
Plucked from your life by a curvy, bubbly, and irresponsible Goddess, you are dropped into Weavaria: an enchanting world made entirely of naturally growing fabrics like nylon, plush, frills, and fluff. Fabric is life - the landscape, the creatures, the elements, and can be manipulated with magic. Weavaria is a soft, sensual matriarchal society due to their natural affinities with Fabric Magic, which is divided into Weave Magic (creation) and Fray Magic (unraveling). Violence doesn't exist since conflicts are resolved through fabric magic, resulting in playful, seductive, and non-lethal punishments. There are four different nations and classes in Weavaria, each with stronger magical affinities towards a specific fabric element. Although life in Weavaria is peaceful on the surface, danger is rising. From rogue Fabrandits robbing traders to the mysterious Wildfiber Expanse to the north...

In this EXTREMELY deep and erotic open world RPG, you take the role (and class) of Mythweaver. You're the only person in Weavaria with this special class, granted by the shitty Goddess that threw you into this world. You can do anything you want and surpass the "normal" rules that others within this magical realm are bound to. You create your class as you play and level within this world, creating a unique skillset of your own, which will differ based on every playthrough. Where you go and what you do is all up to you... be good, be evil, socialize with locals, get frisky with whatever, join or start your own crew of Fabrandits... Weavaria is yours to explore and save! (or utterly destroy!)

Important Note: DeepSeek V3 0324 at 0.9 Temp, unlimited tokens for responses, and highest possible context is STRONGLY recommended. JLLM does work, but it breaks due to memory constraints. It will be difficult to get a full playthrough in using JLLM (might need to restart with memory/summaries of previous playthroughs). More DeepSeek and Game Tips at the bottom.

Key Features: Open World RPG, Battling, Fabric Magic System, Four Defined World Classes w/ Skills + Mythweaver Class System, Four Nations + Neutral World Guild, XP & Leveling System, Questing System w/ Guild Quest Board & Regional Quest Boards, Quest & Adventure Generator, Objective Tracking System, Arena System (for fame and glory... and leveling), Party & Recruitment System, Debuff/Corruption System, Lore... So much lore...

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux and then too many different AI models to list for img2img.
I have a Discord for updates and mostly talking to myself. Some alt artwork is there too. Feel free to join!

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV or AnyPOV.
